mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts (category_id, user_id, title, content) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{userId}, #{title}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.title, p.created_at AS createdAt, p.updated_at AS updatedAt, u.username AS authorName, c.name AS categoryName FROM posts p LEFT JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id ORDER BY p.created_at DESC

SELECT p.id AS post_id, p.title AS title, p.content AS content, p.view_count AS view_count, p.created_at AS created_at, p.updated_at AS updated_at, c.name AS category_name, u.username AS author_name, cm.id AS comment_id, cm.content AS comment_content, cm.created_at AS comment_created_at, cu.username AS comment_author FROM posts p LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN comments cm ON cm.post_id = p.id LEFT JOIN users cu ON cm.user_id = cu.id WHERE p.id = #{id} ORDER BY cm.created_at ASC
mapper.update:
UPDATE posts
title = #{post.title},
content = #{post.content},
updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments (user_id, post_id, content) VALUES (#{post.userId}, #{postId}, #{post.content})
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.title, p.created_at AS createdAt, u.username AS authorName FROM posts p LEFT JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id ORDER BY p.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
